title: Kanbus clock: workspace kbs show fails on invalid configs
description:
When kanbus_clock runs kbs from the workspace root, kbs show fails if any nested repo has an invalid .kanbus.yml (e.g., legacy external_projects). This causes NO DESCRIPTION in cards.

Fix: workspace discovery should skip invalid configs and continue, while single-project root remains strict.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Diagnosed: kbs show from workspace root fails due to invalid .kanbus.yml in nested repo; need workspace discovery to skip invalid configs while keeping strict single-project root.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Investigating NO DESCRIPTION: kbs show from workspace root is erroring when a discovered project lacks an issues directory. Will make Kanbus workspace discovery/issue lookup tolerant (skip missing issues dir) and then verify kanbus_clock shows descriptions. Added debug mode to print kbs stdout/stderr.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed root cause: added kbs show --project-root support in Kanbus and wired kanbus_clock to pass event.repo_root. kbs show now resolves beads-mode projects without ambiguity. PyPixoo tests pass. Ready for you to restart clock and verify descriptions are no longer NO DESCRIPTION.
